pageSubtitle: Learn and develop your knowledge of Vault Radar with these tutorials and code resources.

cards.title: What is Vault Radar?
cards.description: Vault Radar lets platform teams define patterns to let developers deploy application infrastructure.

cards.title: Templates
cards.description: Templates define the infrastructure and configurations that developers need to create new projects.

cards.title: Add-ons
cards.description: Add-ons define infrastructure that developers can add to existing projects.
